description: CompositionDark blue and black water shoes with nylon mesh upper and rubber outsole with drainersWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washEnjoy those lovely summer showers in these grippy ClimaCool water shoes from adidas. Made with a rubber oustole and metallic drainers, these shoes ensure your feet are firm on the ground and dry in wet weather. The nylon upper mesh ensures there’s ample air reaching your feet, keeping them fresh even as you enjoy those splashes of water. A perfect footwear for a day at the pool side too.
